# Tasimelteon 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tasimelteon 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tasimelteon</strong> 目前有 <strong>4 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tasimelteon 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Hetlioz is indicated for the treatment of Non-24-Hour Sleep-Wake Disorder (Non-24) in totally blind adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>bilateral parasagittal parieto-occipital polymicrogyria（99.5%）</li>
<li>insomnia (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（99.4%）</li>
<li>endogenous depression（99.4%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（99.2%）</li>
<li>monomelic amyotrophy（99.2%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（99.2%）</li>
<li>lower motor neuron syndrome with late-adult onset（99.2%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（99.1%）</li>
<li>trichomegaly-retina pigmentary degeneration-dwarfism syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant mitochondrial myopathy with exercise intolerance（99.1%）</li>
<li>lethal arthrogryposis-anterior horn cell disease syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>anxiety disorder（98.7%）</li>
<li>sleep disorder, initiating and maintaining sleep（98.6%）</li>
<li>benign paroxysmal torticollis of infancy（98.6%）</li>
<li>childhood apraxia of speech（98.5%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（98.4%）</li>
<li>rhabdoid tumor（98.4%）</li>
<li>familial generalized lentiginosis（98.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/tasimelteon/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
